# Copilot Instructions

- When implementing or changing functionality, update `SPECIFICATION.md` in the same task if the behavior, data model, routes, configuration, or UI flow changed.
- Prefer minimal, focused changes and keep the specification aligned with the current implementation.
- When adding tests for new behavior, include at least one automated test that covers the main success path.
- keep documentation and comments minimal and focused on the "why" rather than the "what". The code should be self-explanatory about the "what".
